news.headline: UK leads in ghost and vampire tours according to Audley Travel study using data from World Population Review, Tripadvisor, and Rotten Tomatoes.
news.summary: Travel enthusiasts at Audley Travel recently conducted a comprehensive analysis using data from reputable sources such as World Population Review, Tripadvisor, and Rotten Tomatoes to identify the top haunted locations worldwide for those seeking eerie getaways. Their findings revealed that the UK leads the pack in offering the most ghost and vampire tours, with an impressive number of such experiences available. The study sheds light on the growing popularity of spooky tourism, indicating a strong interest in exploring haunted destinations among travelers.

news.headline: Carrier Global (CARR) to announce Q3 earnings on 2024-10-24, estimated EPS $0.82. Past beats boosted stock by 2.99%. Shares trading at $80.15, up 73.41% in 52 weeks. Market sentiment neutral with an average price target.
news.summary: Carrier Global (NYSE:CARR) is set to report its quarterly earnings on Thursday, 2024-10-24. Analysts predict an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.82. The company's past performance has been positive, beating EPS estimates in the previous quarters. Following the last earnings release, where they exceeded the EPS estimate by $0.03, the share price rose by 2.99%. The stock price of Carrier Global was $80.15 as of October 22, with a 52-week increase of 73.41%, indicating a positive market sentiment. Analysts offer a consensus of a Neutral rating for Carrier Global based on 16 analyst ratings. The guidance provided during the earnings report could greatly impact the stock price movement. Investors are eagerly anticipating news of surpassing estimates and seeking favorable guidance for the next quarter.

news.headline: New book by Jim Eskin, released on Oct. 23, 2024, aims to help non-profit leaders secure million-dollar gifts.
news.summary: In San Antonio on October 23, 2024, Jim Eskin launched his latest book titled "How To Score Your First or Next Million-Dollar Gift." The book aims to aid non-profit leaders, both professional and volunteer, in enhancing their organizations’ visibility, prestige, and financial strength.

news.headline: American Airlines Group to announce quarterly earnings on 2024-10-24. Analysts estimate EPS of $0.04. Investors hopeful for positive news.
news.summary: On Thursday, October 24, 2024, American Airlines Group (NASDAQ:AAL) will unveil its most recent quarterly earnings report. Analysts predict the company will showcase an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.04. The market is eagerly anticipating this announcement, with expectations centered around potentially exceeding these projections and offering positive guidance for upcoming periods.

news.headline: California startup UNIGRID Inc. developing advanced sodium-ion batteries receives investment from LG Technology Ventures to create value and support growth.
news.summary: A startup called UNIGRID Inc. in California, specializing in advanced sodium-ion battery development, has recently secured an investment from LG Technology Ventures. This move is in line with LG Technology Ventures' support for startup growth and its commitment to adding value to promising companies.

news.headline: Rogers Communications (NYSE:RCI) to release Q3 earnings on 2024-10-24. Analysts expect EPS of $0.98. Awaited update.
news.summary: On Thursday, October 24, 2024, Rogers Communications (NYSE:RCI) will be announcing its quarterly earnings. Analysts are forecasting an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.98 for the company. The upcoming announcement from Rogers Communications is highly anticipated by investors.

news.headline: Balam and Transfera collaborate to launch world's first Remittance-as-a-Service platform, revolutionizing the industry.
news.summary: In San Antonio on October 23, 2024, Balam, a leading company in stablecoin-supported remittance systems, and Transfera, a subsidiary of Lana Group Inc. recognized for its co-branded debit cards partnership with popular brands such as Chivas del Guadalajara, have collaborated to introduce the first-ever global initiative in the realm of stablecoin-based remittance infrastructure.

news.headline: Global industrial cybersecurity market to reach $135.11 billion by 2029, with 9.8% CAGR. Valued at $84.54 billion in 2024.
news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, as of October 23, 2024, the worldwide industrial cybersecurity sector was valued at approximately USD 84.54 billion. It is forecasted to rise to around USD 135.11 billion by 2029, indicating a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 9.8% throughout the projection period.

news.headline: KONE to report quarterly earnings on 2024-10-24, with expected EPS of $0.28. Investors look for positive guidance.
news.summary: The upcoming quarterly earnings report for KONE (OTC:KNYJY) is scheduled for Thursday, October 24, 2024. Analysts are expecting the company to reveal an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.28. Investors are eager for KONE to surpass this estimate and potentially offer optimistic guidance for future growth. This information is crucial for new investors considering involvement in the company. Detailed coverage can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.summary: On Thursday, October 24, 2024, KB Financial Group (NYSE:KB) is set to unveil its quarterly earnings. Analysts forecast an earnings per share (EPS) of $2.64. Investors are eager for the company to potentially exceed these expectations. Visit Benzinga.com for more details.

news.headline: Drivers Legal Plan secured endorsement from North Carolina Trucking Association, boosting credibility among commercial truck drivers.
news.summary: On October 23, 2024, in Oklahoma City, Drivers Legal Plan (DLP), a nationwide legal firm focusing on defending commercial truck drivers against CDL tickets, revealed their official endorsement by the North Carolina Trucking Association (NCTA). The NCTA is a non-profit group advocating for the trucking industry.

news.headline: OrthoLite® hires Raj Santhana as VP of Operational Excellence to enhance manufacturing, innovation, and digital transformation.
news.summary: OrthoLite®, a prominent company in the comfort footwear industry, has welcomed Raj Santhana as the Vice President of Operational Excellence. In his new role, Santhana will oversee operational aspects, including manufacturing efficiency, innovation, and the implementation of automation and digital advancements. Working alongside the Global Foam Innovation Team, Santhana will play a key role in enhancing OrthoLite's manufacturing processes.

news.headline: Top-rated psychedelic mushroom retreat, Confluence Retreats, announces winter 'renewal' programs with 1,000 legal psilocybin journeys.
news.summary: Leveraging insights obtained from facilitating 1,000 legal psilocybin experiences, Confluence Retreats introduces its upcoming Winter Renewal Programs through the Non-Profit Hi-U Foundation. Situated in ASHLAND, Ore., the retreat stands out as the most esteemed and well-received licensed psilocybin retreat in the industry.

news.headline: LKQ to report Q3 earnings with estimated EPS of $0.89. Previous EPS missed by $0.05, stock price rose by 3.16%. Shares at $37.48, down 14.01% in 52 weeks. Analysts view LKQ as Outperform with a target price of $58.43.

In the previous quarter, EPS missed by $0.05 leading to a 3.16% share price increase the next day. Over the last four quarters, LKQ saw fluctuating EPS estimates and actuals, affecting stock prices. Currently at $37.48, shares have dropped by 14.01% in the past year, concerning long-term investors. Analysts favor an "Outperform" rating for LKQ, with a one-year price target of $58.43. For investors, understanding market sentiments and expectations is crucial for informed decision-making.

news.headline: Trimas Packaging to exhibit at Beautyworld Middle East in Dubai showcasing beauty and cosmetic innovations. Booth #3-H19 from Oct 28-30.
news.summary: TriMas Packaging, a major division of TriMas Corporation (NASDAQ: TRS), is set to present its newest beauty and cosmetic packaging solutions at Beautyworld Middle East 2024 in Dubai. The event will take place at the Dubai World Trade Centre, particularly at Booth #3-H19, from October 28th to 30th. Beautyworld Middle East is a significant international trade fair focusing on beauty, wellness, fragrances, and beauty accessories. As one of the biggest beauty exhibitions globally, this event is crucial for TriMas to showcase its latest innovations in the field.

news.headline: Cetera Financial Group renews partnership with Regions Bank after success since 2013. SAN DIEGO, Oct. 23, 2024.
news.summary: In 2013, the partnership between Cetera Financial Group (Cetera) and the premier financial advisor Wealth Hub began, leading to remarkable success. The collaboration, which has been renewed, is recognized for consistently delivering top-notch outcomes in the industry. As of October 23, 2024, the firms in San Diego are continuing their joint efforts.

news.headline: DHL and Diageo NA to add two hydrogen fuel cell trucks to US fleet, boosting sustainability efforts.
news.summary: DHL Supply Chain and Diageo North America have revealed intentions to introduce two fuel cell electric trucks utilizing hydrogen for power into their fleet operating in the United States.

news.headline: Home sales decreased by 1% in September.
Proof and ServiceLink Mortgages integrate for fraud protection in real estate transactions, enhancing ID verification.
news.summary: In Boston, ServiceLink Mortgages announced the integration of Proof’s Identify solution to provide robust fraud protection across all transaction types. This partnership will enhance security measures, ensuring the safety of all transactions.

news.headline: Narsingh Chaudhary appointed President of Black & Veatch's Fuels & Natural Resources sector, with 30+ years of experience.
news.summary: Narsingh Chaudhary has been named president of Black & Veatch’s Fuels & Natural Resources (FNR) division in Overland Park, Kansas. This appointment, effective immediately, comes as Chaudhary transitions from his current position as president of the Asia Pacific and India (APAC) region within the company. He will keep this role until a replacement is found. With over 30 years of experience in the energy and infrastructure sectors, Chaudhary has demonstrated a strong track record in global markets, positioning him well to lead the FNR sector.

news.headline: Wolters Kluwer to host webinar on BOI reporting on Nov 12, 1-2 p.m. ET for impacted businesses. Presented by Sandra Feldman and Anirudh John.
news.summary: In anticipation of the upcoming year-end reporting deadline, Wolters Kluwer CT Corporation in Minneapolis will be hosting a webinar titled “Preparing for the Corporate Transparency Act deadline.” This online event, scheduled for 1-2 p.m. ET on Tuesday, November 12, will provide expert guidance to businesses on filing beneficial ownership information (BOI) reports. The webinar will be presented by Sandra Feldman and Anirudh John from Wolters Kluwer CT Corporation, offering essential insights to impacted businesses aiming to comply with the Corporate Transparency Act.

news.headline: Stellantis and Factorial collaborate to advance electric vehicles with solid-state battery tech.
news.summary: Stellantis, in collaboration with Factorial, is advancing the electric vehicle industry by introducing cutting-edge solid-state battery technology. This partnership aims to revolutionize the market with more efficient and sustainable electric vehicles. The solid-state batteries have shown an impressive increase in energy density by 50% compared to traditional lithium-ion batteries. This breakthrough will significantly enhance the performance and range of electric vehicles, ultimately benefiting consumers and the environment. The strategic alliance between Stellantis and Factorial signifies a pivotal moment in transitioning towards a greener and more sustainable transportation sector.

news.headline: Synchrony donates $100,000 to Women in HVACR for scholarships, supporting their Education as an Equalizer initiative.
news.summary: In a recent contribution, Synchrony, a leading consumer financial services company, donated $100,000 to Women in HVACR in support of scholarships as part of their Education as an Equalizer Initiative. This initiative aims to promote gender equality in education and workforce representation. The donation underscores Synchrony's commitment to supporting women in traditionally male-dominated industries and highlights their dedication to fostering diversity and inclusivity. The substantial donation showcases Synchrony's efforts to empower women through education and career opportunities in the HVACR field.

news.headline: DaVita Research presents 5 projects at ASN's Kidney Week 2024. Focus on upstream CKD management, access, and equity.
news.summary: On October 23, 2024, DaVita Clinical Research (DCR), a subsidiary of DaVita Inc. specializing in kidney care research, will unveil findings from five groundbreaking research initiatives at the American Society of Nephrology (ASN) conference in Denver and San Diego. The studies showcase innovative advancements in the field and underline DCR's commitment to driving progress in kidney care.

news.headline: Help at Home acquires Caregiver Services, Inc., increasing presence in Florida home care market.
news.summary: In a significant move, Help at Home, a top national provider of in-home personal care services, has acquired Caregiver Services, Inc. This transaction signifies a substantial expansion for the company in the Florida home care market. The development was confirmed on October 23, 2024. Help at Home's presence in Florida has notably increased following this acquisition.

news.headline: Ford Foundation pledges $1.5M in emergency funding to aid communities in U.S. Southeast impacted by Hurricanes Helene and Milton.
news.summary: In efforts to aid in the equitable recovery of communities struck by Hurricanes Helene and Milton, the Ford Foundation revealed its pledge of $1.5 million in emergency aid. This funding will be directed towards supporting local nonprofits and small businesses.

news.headline: Veolia's hazardous waste plant in Arkansas wins 2024 Diamond Award for environmental leadership, recognized for sustainable operations.
news.summary: A facility in Gum Springs, Arkansas owned by Veolia North America has been honored with the 2024 Diamond Award for environmental leadership. This state-of-the-art hazardous waste treatment plant has been recognized for its dedication to sustainable practices that protect natural resources. The award is presented annually by the Arkansas Environmental Federation (AEF), a prominent supporter of local industries. The AEF plays a key role in influencing environmental laws and providing regulatory assistance.

news.headline: Lotlinx Q3 report shows high day supply, aging vehicle inventory in complex market; electrified vehicles rising. Customers excel in inventory management.
news.summary: As the market share of electrified vehicles continues to increase, the automotive industry is facing ongoing inventory challenges. Despite this trend, customers of Lotlinx, a prominent VIN-specific data company in the auto sector, are surpassing the market averages in effective inventory management. This development was observed in Detroit on October 23, 2024, where Lotlinx has helped its clients navigate the industry-wide issue. The company's innovative approach has enabled dealerships to better handle their inventory, showcasing results that outperform the industry standards during this time of transition.

news.headline: Sesame Place Philadelphia joins Hidden Disabilities Sunflower Program, enhancing accessibility. First US park to do so.
news.summary: Sesame Place in Philadelphia announced on October 23, 2024, that it is enhancing its current accessibility efforts by introducing the Sunflower program. This program is in addition to being recognized as a Certified Autism Center. This development solidifies Sesame Place's position as a leader in providing inclusive experiences. Sesame Place, known for being the first theme park globally with such a designation, continues to prioritize inclusivity through these efforts. The Sunflower program aims to provide further support for individuals with autism and other sensory sensitivities. This initiative underscores Sesame Place's commitment to creating a welcoming environment for all guests.

news.headline: Momentum Technologies opens new headquarters in Carrollton, Texas with cutting-edge facilities on Oct. 23, 2024.
news.summary: In Carrollton, Texas, on October 23, 2024, Momentum Technologies, a prominent company specializing in processing and reclaiming high-purity critical metals and minerals, marked the inauguration of its latest headquarters. The new facility boasts a cutting-edge demonstration unit, along with advanced research and development capabilities.

news.headline: Jackery establishes new industry standards for solar generators, aiming to innovate portable energy solutions.
news.summary: In an effort to advance innovation and sustainability in portable energy solutions, Jackery, a top provider of clean energy solutions based in FREMONT, Calif., unveiled new enterprise standards for its solar generators on Oct. 23, 2024. This proactive step aims to enhance the quality and efficiency of their products, setting a benchmark in the industry. This move is crucial as the world transitions towards cleaner and more efficient energy sources.

news.headline: Law firm Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check LLP urges Medpace Holdings, Inc. investors with losses to contact them after investigating potential securities law violations.
news.summary: A legal investigation is underway by the law firm of Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP based in Radnor, Pennsylvania. They are looking into possible breaches of federal securities laws concerning investors of Medpace Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: MEDP). The investigation started on October 21, 2024. For more information, visit www.ktmc.com.

news.headline: IHG introduces Winter Chalet programming with curated experiences and F&B menus, Atlanta, Oct. 23, 2024.
news.summary: IHG's Luxury & Lifestyle Americas collection presents specially crafted experiences for the Winter Chalet campaign, featuring a Chalet Day and exclusive food & beverage offerings. This year's campaign will take place in Atlanta, with the announcement being made on October 23, 2024. IHG Hotels & Resorts continues to enhance the Winter Chalet tradition, offering guests memorable seasonal experiences.

news.headline: Yellow Rose by Kendra Scott launches Yellowstone collection in honor of TV show, inspired by Dutton Ranch & Beth/Rip's love story.
news.summary: Yellow Rose by Kendra Scott, based in Austin, Texas, has introduced a new collection in tribute to the iconic Yellowstone Dutton Ranch and the love story of Beth and Rip. Released on October 23, 2024, the collection is influenced by the anticipation for the fifth season of Paramount Network's popular show, Yellowstone. This new line pays homage to the series with its unique styles.

news.headline: EverBank launches new corporate asset finance division led by Maureen Carr; offering structured loans & leases to companies.
news.summary: EverBank, based in Jacksonville, Florida, announced the establishment of a new commercial division on October 23, 2024. This division aims to enhance the company's equipment finance capabilities by providing structured equipment loans and leases to large and middle-market companies. With this expansion, EverBank has bolstered its services in the equipment finance sector to cater to the needs of businesses seeking financing solutions for their operations. This move demonstrates EverBank's commitment to supporting companies with efficient financial options.

news.headline: DOWN Dating App hits 15M users, ranks #5 in US with 400% revenue growth in 2024. Standout in the dating industry.
news.summary: Down, a prominent player in the dating app sector, has risen to the position of the 5th most popular dating app in the United States. The company achieved a remarkable 400% growth in revenue in 2024. A key highlight for Down is the recent milestone of acquiring a total of 15 million registered users. This success can be attributed to the unique feature that allows users to...

news.headline: NBHWC announces leadership changes to advance health and wellness coaching. Focus on evidence-informed standards.
news.summary: On October 23, 2024, in San Diego, the National Board for Health and Wellness Coaching (NBHWC) disclosed changes in leadership to steer the organization towards the future of health and wellness coaching. Emphasizing the progression of the profession via standards backed by evidence, the NBHWC aims to propel the field forward.

Inex One's report shows B2B & healthcare survey sample industry surpassing $1.1 billion globally.
news.summary: Today, Inex One, a prominent market research platform, unveiled its latest report titled "The State of the B2B and Healthcare Survey Sample Industry." According to the report, the worldwide B2B and healthcare survey sample market has achieved significant growth, reaching a noteworthy milestone. The specific figures disclosed in the report highlight the substantial expansion of this market segment. The report provides valuable insights into the current status and trends within the B2B and healthcare survey sample industry, offering a comprehensive analysis for industry professionals and stakeholders.

news.headline: Navy Federal completes 2024 Student Loans Scholarship Sweepstakes, with $5,000 scholarships for 3 grand prize winners.
news.summary: In Vienna, VA, Navy Federal Credit Union successfully concluded its 2024 Student Loans Scholarship Sweepstakes, offering eligible members a chance to win a $5,000 scholarship for the upcoming academic year. The sweepstakes aimed to cover college tuition, room, and board expenses for 2024-2025. Out of numerous entries, three grand prize winners were chosen by Navy Federal, each receiving a $5,000 award towards their college expenses. One of the fortunate winners was Kaison M., currently enrolled at The Virginia Military Institute.

news.headline: US Existing Home Sales change Actual -1% (Forecast 0.52%, Previous -2.5%)
US Existing Home Sales Actual 3.84M (Forecast 3.88M, Previous 3.86M)
Stocks of Starbucks fall following poor preliminary quarterly earnings report.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate has reached 7.9%, with a total of 12.6 million people currently unemployed. This marks a significant increase from the previous month. Additionally, the report showed that only a small percentage of individuals who lost their jobs have been able to find new employment opportunities. The economic impact of these findings is expected to be substantial, with many families facing financial hardship as a result. Experts are concerned about the long-term consequences of such high levels of unemployment and are calling for immediate action to address the issue.

news.headline: Aidium introduces AI tool to analyze 5,000+ data points, boosting loan conversions for lenders.
news.summary: A newly introduced AI feature by Aidium Mortgage CRM in Boulder, Colo. is capable of analyzing over 5,000 consumer data points. This innovative tool provides lenders with a strategic approach to boosting loan conversions by prioritizing the most viable leads. The feature was announced on Oct. 22, 2024, and aims to revolutionize the lending industry by leveraging advanced technology to optimize decision-making processes for lenders.

news.headline: Mercy For Animals expose animal cruelty at PQA Plus-certified farm, highlighting certification failures. LOS ANGELES, Oct. 23, 2024.
news.summary: A recent report has revealed significant failures in PQA Plus certification, uncovering atrocities at certified farms. The disturbing findings, exposed by Mercy For Animals, detail instances of brutal animal cruelty at a Pork Quality Assurance (PQA) Plus-certified pig farm. The report, released in Los Angeles on October 23, 2024, sheds light on widespread issues within the certification system and highlights the urgency of addressing the welfare of animals in the agriculture industry. Viewer discretion is advised due to the graphic nature of the documented abuses.

news.headline: Canada's central bank cuts interest rate by 0.5%, citing economic concerns.
